description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones featuring large, circular ear cups with a wood-textured exterior and thick, black cushioned padding for comfort. The headband is composed of two parallel black bands, connected by a central, flexible support that appears to provide both structure and adjustability. The ear cups are attached to the headband with robust, black plastic or metal arms, which include visible pivot points for folding or adjusting the fit. The wood grain finish on the ear cups gives the headphones a premium, stylish appearance, while the matte black components add a modern, utilitarian touch. No visible wires or controls are present, suggesting a wireless design. The overall construction appears sturdy and designed for both comfort and durability, suitable for use in urban environments such as public transport, parks, or cafes.
description: A pair of over-ear headphones with wood-textured ear cups, thick black padding, and a dual-band black headband. The design is modern and robust, blending premium wood grain with matte black elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, wood-textured ear cups and the dual black headband arching above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular wood grain ear cup, black arm, and pivot mechanism.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetrical ear cups and headband structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other ear cup and arm with visible pivot.
